zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Ann LeGris於1485年出生在英國素福爾可格洛托時，她的父親John Le Gris18歲，母親Elizabeth Lappage22歲。她於1509年與Richard Doggett在英國英格蘭素福爾可格洛托結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1580年在英國英格蘭素福爾可格洛托享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Ann LeGris于1485年出生在英国素福爾可格洛托时，她的父亲John Le Gris18岁，母亲Elizabeth Lappage22岁。她于1509年与Richard Doggett在英国英格兰素福爾可格洛托结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1580年在英国英格兰素福爾可格洛托享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: LeGris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname, with fused masculine definite article le, from gris ‘gray’, denoting a man with gray hair, a gray complexion, or who habitually wore gray.
habitational name from Le Gris, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare   Lagree   and   Legree  .

variants.name: Legree
meanings: Altered form of French   Legris  . Compare   Lagree  .

variants.name: Lagree
meanings: Altered form of French   Legris  . Compare   Legree  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Ann LeGris was born in 1485, in Groton, Suffolk, England, her father, John Le Gris, was 18 and her mother, Elizabeth Lappage, was 22. She married Richard Doggett in 1509, in Groton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1580, in Groton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

Elle a épousé Richard Doggett en 1509, à Groton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1580, à Groton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Ann LeGris è nata il nel 1485 nel Groton, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Le Gris, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lappage, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard Doggett nel 1509, nel Groton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1580, nel Groton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann LeGrisが1485年にイギリススフォルクグロトンで生まれた時，父John Le Grisは18歳，母Elizabeth Lappageは22歳であった。1509年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグロトンでRichard Doggettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1580年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグロトンで95歳で死去した。

ko.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann LeGris(이)가 1485년 영국 수폴크 그로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Le Gris(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lappage(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그로턴에서 Richard Doggett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그로턴에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Ann LeGris nasceu em 1485, em Groton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Le Gris, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lappage, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Doggett em 1509, em Groton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Ann LeGris родилась в 1485 г. в местности гротон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Le Gris было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lappage, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Doggett в 1509 г. в местности гротон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1580 г. в местности гротон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.
